question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged user supply a keys list containing a single known key in HookStorageRequest to probe whether a specific storage slot exists for any target hook, using the presence or absence of results as a boolean oracle for data written by submitted transactions?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user supply a keys list containing a single known key and a narrow timestamp range in HookStorageRequest to determine the exact consensus_timestamp at which a specific storage slot was last modified by a submitted transaction, leaking transaction timing information?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user supply hookIds containing Long.MAX_VALUE in HooksRequest with upperBound=Long.MAX_VALUE, causing the idsInRange filter (hookId >= lowerBound && hookId <= upperBound) to include Long.MAX_VALUE and pass it to findByOwnerIdAndHookIdIn(), probing for sentinel hook records from submitted transactions?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged user supply a keys collection with duplicate byte array entries in HookStorageRequest, causing getKeysInRange() to produce a list with duplicates that is passed to findByOwnerIdAndHookIdAndKeyInAndDeletedIsFalse(), potentially causing the database to return duplicate rows for the same storage key from submitted transactions?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user supply a keys collection with duplicate byte array entries in HookStorageRequest for a historical query, causing findByKeyInAndTimestampBetween() to receive duplicate keys in the IN clause, potentially causing the native SQL query to return duplicate rows for hook storage changes from submitted transactions?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged user exploit the fact that getHookStorage() does not verify that the hookId belongs to the specified ownerId before querying hookStorageRepository, allowing cross-account hook storage access by supplying a valid ownerId with a hookId from a different account's submitted transactions?
